text:
Princess Corco (, Koruko Ōjo) was a member of royalty in an unspecified place. Her mummified remains were for sale at the Underground Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 72 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

The mummified body of Princess Corco is one of the items for sale at the Underground Auction and one of the items Tocino, Ivlenkov, and Baise are told to obtain for Neon Nostrade. Neon is only concerned about whether the mummy was stolen after the auction massacre, but Kurapika assures her that the items were moved to a safe location, Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 73 much to Neon's disappointment. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 9, Chapter 79 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In Episode 52 of the 1999 anime adaptation (subtitled version), she is mistakenly referred to as a queen.

Anime and Manga Differences

While in the 2011 anime adaptation an image of her mummy in a sarcophagus is shown in a slide show Hunter × Hunter - Episode 41 (2011) and in the 1999 anime adaptation it is shown only partially since Dalzollene's head is covering the slide, Hunter × Hunter - Episode 51 (1999) it was never shown in the manga.
